calendar.matters:
Petition For Order For Construction Of Terms Of Trust (Probate Code 17200)
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Schivo appeared in person for John Reimonenq (trustee).

The Court agrees that the trust provisions should be construed to provide for outright distribution of the real property to petitioner, rather than creating a life estate, as proposed by the petition. The Court indicated its intent to grant the request to so construe and as prayed. The Court and counsel then discuss whether the issue of title to the real property should be presented by a Heggstad petition, rather than adding a new provision to the trust concerning how trust property should be titled. The Court indicated its intent to deny the request for adding the provision to deal with the title issue, without prejudice to the filing of a Heggstad petition. The Court took the petition under submission with its intent to modify the proposed order.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition For Order For Construction Of Terms Of Trust (Probate Code 17200)
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
